headline: Entergy (ETR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: 2026 guidance remains on track, and we are increasing our already strong adjusted EPS outlooks driven by 8.5% retail sales growth.  For several years, we have worked with stakeholders to recruit data centers and capture the transformative impact they can have on our communities through investment, jobs, and other support while at the same time protecting and benefiting existing customers.  The Fair Share Plus pledge is a set of guiding principles that ensures that data centers pay their fair share for the power they consume, plus additional benefits for customers and communities.

headline: Industrial Demand Surge & Retail Sales Growth Drive ETR's Q1 Earnings

headline: Morgan Stanley Updates Utility Outlook, Lowers View on Edison International (EIX)
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.10%, Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 21, Morgan Stanley lowered its price target on Edison International (NYSE:EIX) to $70 from $71. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares.
